name: Akstiletto
description: These diminutive rapid-fire Stiletto machine-pistols are just the right size to be akimbo style without sacrificing accuracy.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: These diminutive rapid-fire Stiletto machine-pistols are just the right size to be akimbo style without sacrificing accuracy.

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Zephyr Prime 22.16.4
patchlogs.changes: Vauban Prime, Fragor Prime and Akstiletto Prime have entered the Prime Vault, and their Relics are no longer be obtainable in the game.

patchlogs.name: Update 19.13.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixe the Akstiletto Conclave Skin clip shifting to the wrong spot.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Hotfix 19.3.2 + 19.3.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Removed the “flashlight” from Akstiletto & Akstiletto Prime for performance reasons

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Reduced damage of Akstiletto Prime in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.fixes:
•    Fixed weapon clips (Soma, Akstiletto, etc.) lingering during Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors. 
•    Fixed incorrect icon sizing of the Akstiletto and Ballistica in the Market.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.12.0: Vauban Prime & 18.12.1
patchlogs.additions: including Vauban Prime, Fragor Prime, Akstiletto Prime, and exclusive Customizations only available through Prime Access!
